expectations.text: Output contains implementation tasks with specific file paths (not just 'update the controller')
expectations.evidence: Each section specifies file paths: app/models/user.rb, app/controllers/users/avatars_controller.rb, config/routes.rb, app/helpers/avatar_helper.rb, app/views/users/settings/_avatar_form.html.erb, etc.

expectations.text: Tasks are ordered by dependency (model/migration before controller before view)
expectations.evidence: Order: 1-Model layer, 2-Image variants, 3-Controller, 4-Routes, 5-View helper, 6-Views, 7-CSS, 8-Default asset, 9-Direct upload, 10-S3 config. Model before controller before views.

expectations.text: Output contains Given/When/Then acceptance criteria with AC-N numbering
expectations.evidence: Uses Given/When/Then format but does NOT use AC-N numbering. Acceptance criteria are unnumbered paragraphs without titles.

expectations.text: ACs cover happy path (successful upload and display)
expectations.evidence: First two ACs cover successful JPEG/PNG upload to S3 and nav bar thumbnail display.

expectations.text: ACs cover error cases (wrong file type, file too large)
expectations.evidence: AC 4: 'attempt to upload a file that is not JPEG or PNG... rejected with validation error'. AC 5: 'attempt to upload a file larger than 5MB... rejected with validation error'.

expectations.text: ACs cover edge cases (replacing existing avatar, no avatar default state)
expectations.evidence: AC 3 covers removal. AC 7 covers default placeholder. However, replacing an existing avatar is NOT explicitly covered as an AC - it's only mentioned in the Edge Cases section as a note about atomic replacement.

expectations.text: Output includes a testing strategy section with unit and integration tests
expectations.evidence: No testing strategy section exists. The spec has sections for Technical Design, Implementation Steps, Acceptance Criteria, and Edge Cases, but no dedicated testing section.

expectations.text: No tasks contain TBD or placeholder values
expectations.evidence: All implementation steps have specific details. No TBD or placeholder text found.
